hooks.command: c=$(jq -r ".tool_input.command"); if printf "%s" "$c" | grep -Eq "(^|[;&|(\`]|&&|\|\|)[[:space:]]*git([[:space:]]+(-[A-Za-z]([[:space:]]*[^[:space:]]+)?|--[^[:space:]]+))*[[:space:]]+(add|commit|push)([[:space:]]|\$)"; then printf "%s" "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"permissionDecision\":\"deny\",\"permissionDecisionReason\":\"git add/commit/push are reserved for the user in this project. Make the file changes only; the user stages, commits, and pushes manually.\"}}"; fi
